title: Message board for staff
wikitext:
[]: Message board for staff             Quote Post by nostrict » Sun Jul 04, 2021 12:25 am Hi, I'm Japanese evangelion fan. I created a message board of evanlion. I wish many people write the board of thank you and Good-bye for evanlieon. If many messages are collected, I'll send a message to Khara inc directly. (I know some of evangelion staff, so I think I can give message to them.) I wish You write a message and notify this site to other people. https://eva.nostrict.dev/en

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sun Jul 04, 2021 1:28 am This was a great idea. I contributed to it. Thank you for giving us the opportunity to say goodbye!

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jul 04, 2021 1:42 am This is nice, I'll have to write something for it as well! Thanks for letting us know about this.

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by nostrict » Sun Jul 04, 2021 4:47 am Thank you for your reply. I'm glad to read your message.

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Jul 04, 2021 10:08 am Thank you very much for doing this! ありがとうございます

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Jul 04, 2021 10:23 am Oh, that's a very nice touch. I like this a lot.

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Jul 04, 2021 10:54 am Thank you very much for doing this. どうもありがとうございます。 I have made a front page announcement, and hopefully it will help direct more visitors to your message board.

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by BusterMachine4 » Sun Jul 04, 2021 11:29 am I also wrote a message a while ago. Thanks for giving us the opportunity to congratulate the people who worked so hard on this series.

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sun Jul 04, 2021 12:02 pm I wrote a message too. Thank you for provinding us this message board.

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by nostrict » Sun Jul 04, 2021 12:26 pm Thank you for many messages. I appreciate the display of the top page. now, I'm surprised at the many accesses for my site. I found out that Evangelion is loved by many people of the world. If you haven't seen "3.0+1.0" yet, I highly recommend it. After I watched the "3.0+1.0", I decide create this site. because "3.0+1.0" is really great.

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by BusterMachine4 » Sun Jul 04, 2021 12:32 pm nostrict wrote: If you haven't seen "3.0+1.0" yet, I highly recommend it. After I watched the "3.0+1.0", I decide create this site. because "3.0+1.0" is really great.

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by nostrict » Sun Jul 04, 2021 12:44 pm I didn't know it until today, sorry. Before "3.0+1.0" was released, many Japanese forgot about Eva. But now, everyone is enthusiastic about Evangelion.

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Jul 04, 2021 12:49 pm There is no need to apologize. Many fans outside of Japan have been very eager to hear any news of 3.0 + 1.0. Some of us do not want to be spoiled and have kept away from all information about 3.0 + 1.0 but many others have been eagerly listening to everything that has come out from second-hand sources. Once 3.0 + 1.0 is released on Amazon, I think the worldwide response will be even stronger. Evangelion is a work that deals with loneliness, the difficulty of communication, and the difficulties of the modern human condition. Therefore, it is a work that has great resonance across cultures and peoples throughout the world. Hence its great popularity.

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by EvaChero » Tue Jul 06, 2021 12:44 pm that was a terrific feeling to post, thanks so much!

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Thu Jul 08, 2021 7:26 am Congratulations Anno behind best mecha anime franchise and Yuko Miyamura behind voice acting Asuka.

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by nostrict » Fri Jul 09, 2021 8:35 am Thank you everyone for posting many messages. After watching 3.0+1.0, everyone will want to say thank you and say goodbye for all staff, Charactor and 26 years of history. I hope you remember this website on 8/13. thanks!

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Jul 10, 2021 10:20 am Will your message board continue to be open in August? Many users here will return after 8/13 and it is very likely that they will all want to send their thanks.

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by nostrict » Sat Jul 10, 2021 2:35 pm Yes. I think many people will need this message board after 8/13. I want to know how you feel after you watch the movie. and I want to bring to messages to staff.

[]: "goodbye is what you say when you hope we see each other again."             Quote Post by nostrict » Thu Aug 12, 2021 7:10 pm Many people should be impressed by watching "3.0 + 1.0" on Amazon Prime Video now. I want you to write on the farewall board while you remember the feelings you were impressed with. "goodbye is what you say when you hope we see each other again." Thanks!

[]: Re: Message board for staff             Quote Post by hui43210 » Thu Aug 12, 2021 8:51 pm You were right nostrict, 3.0+1.0 was amazing!
